design_philosophy: Objective, rigid, and functional. 95% of the UI is monochrome, letting data and functional color elements stand out. A 'Control Room' approach for high-density information, prioritizing clarity, hierarchy, and scanability over aesthetics.

components.card: bg-white border border-zinc-200 rounded-none md:rounded-lg shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200 flex flex-col h-full
components.header: sticky top-0 z-50 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-zinc-200 px-6 py-4 flex items-center justify-between
components.sidebar: fixed left-0 top-0 h-full w-64 bg-zinc-50 border-r border-zinc-200 p-4 hidden md:flex flex-col

interactions.hover: Subtle background shifts (e.g., hover:bg-zinc-100) and explicit text color changes.
interactions.focus: High contrast focus rings: focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary focus:ring-offset-2

icons.style: Regular for standard UI, Duotone for active states or marketing accents, size 20px default.

images.description: Professional user avatar for the top navigation profile dropdown.
Clean 3D hand gesture for empty states like 'No recipes created yet'.

component_guidelines.buttons: Flat, squared or max rounded-md. Primary: bg-[#002FA7] text-white hover:bg-[#002482]. Secondary: bg-white border border-zinc-200 text-zinc-900 hover:bg-zinc-50.
component_guidelines.inputs: Shadcn defaults but with explicit focus rings (focus-visible:ring-[#002FA7]). Background white, border zinc-200.
component_guidelines.tables: Dense. text-sm. Subtle zebra striping (even:bg-zinc-50). border-collapse. text-left alignment except for numbers/costs which should be text-right.
component_guidelines.charts: Recharts or Shadcn Charts. Use the functional color palette. Maintain accessibility by ensuring high contrast between data points.
component_guidelines.modals: Backdrop blur bg-black/60. Modal background solid white. Sharp corners or max rounded-lg. No glassmorphism on the modal itself.

accessibility.testing: All interactive elements must have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='create-recipe-button').
accessibility.contrast: Text contrast must meet WCAG AA (4.5:1 for normal text). Do not use pure gray (#808080); tint it with the primary color slightly.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Tailwind CSS extensively. Create a sidebar layout.
Implement Recharts for the cost breakdown visualization (pie charts for overheads/materials, bar charts for comparisons).
Create a modular, dense 'Control Room' dashboard view as the main route.
Use Shadcn UI components for dropdowns, selects, tables, and dialogs.
Strictly follow the typographic scale: Manrope for headings, IBM Plex Sans for body.
Do not use card components everywhere; where possible, use 'Grid Borders' or raw tables to save space and present dense data effectively.
